evaluation.description: Evaluation questions for the CO-OPS MCP Server. Each question tests tool usage against real NOAA CO-OPS data.

question.text: What is the tidal range (MHHW minus MLLW) at station 9414290 (San Francisco) in meters?
question.hint: Retrieve datums for station 9414290 in metric units and compute MHHW - MLLW.

question.text: Which CO-OPS water level station in Florida has the highest recorded extreme water level?
question.hint: List water level stations filtered by state FL, then query extreme water levels for each.

question.text: How many active water level stations are there in the state of New York?
question.hint: List stations with type=waterlevels and state=NY, using a high limit to get all results.

question.text: What is the sea level trend at The Battery, NY (8518750)?
question.hint: Query sea level trends for station 8518750.

question.text: What are the names of the 3 closest CO-OPS water level stations to latitude 25.77, longitude -80.13 (Miami Beach)?
question.hint: Search for nearest waterlevels stations to (25.77, -80.13) with limit=3.

question.text: What is the mean tidal range at Honolulu (1612340) in feet?
question.hint: Retrieve datums for station 1612340 in english units, compute MHW - MLW.

question.text: What is the station name and state for CO-OPS station 8443970?
How many annual minor flood days were recorded at 8518750 (The Battery) in 2023?
question.hint: Query flood stats for station 8518750 with year=2023.

question.text: What datums are available at station 9414290 (San Francisco)?
question.hint: Get datums for station 9414290 and list all datum names.

question.text: What sensors are installed at station 8724580 (Key West)?
